title: Just Connected
description: Involves some minor retexturing of the default textures as to better allow for the connection of the textures!
body:
# ECanDo's Connected Texture Pack

## **IMPORTANT!!!** Either [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity, 'https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity') or [OptiFine](https://www.optifine.net/home, 'https://www.optifine.net/home') is needed for the texture pack to work.

A more simplistic texture pack that gets rid of those, sometimes ugly, lines between blocks. Overall just making blocks of the same type work better together.

It is dependent on the [OptiFine CTM](https://optifine.readthedocs.io/ctm.html) format that is also provided by Continuity. Continuity is a great option  for those playing on Fabric, if Sodium is being used, Continuity will not work with out [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium). [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) is also needed for Fabric. When playing on Forge, OptiFine is the best option.

Will continue adding blocks as time permits it.

Supported Blocks
---
The currently supported connected blocks are as follows:
 - Sea Lantern
 - Polished Granite
 - Polished Andesite
 - Polished Diorite
 - Polished Deepslate
 - Polished Blackstone 
 - Smooth Stone
 - Iron Blocks
 - Redstone Lamps
 - All Stained Glass
